IPEN + CGFED vs. Samsung Electronics

Filed4 October 2018
CompanySamsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
Country of operationVietnam
ComplainantIPEN and Research Center for Gender, Family and Environment (CGFED)
National Contact PointKorean NCP
OutcomeMediation rejected by company — initial assessment closed

Issues alleged

  • Occupational health and safety in semiconductor assembly
  • Worker exposure to hazardous chemicals
  • Refusal to disclose chemical inventory to workers
  • Human rights — right to information
